creator: acidos@bandwidth-junkies.net
text:
No objection.  I had only tested with 1.4.

Adam

On Wed, Sep 27, 2006 at 07:22:07PM +0200, Stefan Walter wrote:
> Hi,
> 
> is there a reason for JAVA_VERSION being set to 1.4? A quick test showed
> that it compiles fine (with a few warnings) with JDK 1.5 when setting
> JAVA_VERSION to 1.4+. If there aren't any objections, I'll adjust
> JAVA_VERSION accordingly when committing this.
> 
> Regards,
> Stefan
